sentences.translationEn: The family checked out of the hotel in the morning.

sentences.translation: Službenik im se oprošten i poželio im sretan put.
sentences.translationEn: The employee bid them farewell and wished them safety.

sentences.translation: Uzeli su torbe i otišli na stanicu.
sentences.translationEn: They carried their bags and went to the station.

sentences.translation: Bilo je to lijepo putovanje koje neće zaboraviti.
sentences.translationEn: It was a beautiful trip they would never forget.
